message:
refactor(core): continue runtime_compat migration for replay.rs and web.rs

replay.rs (+1/-2):
- Replace \`tokio::sync::watch\` import with
  \`crate::runtime_compat::{sleep, watch}\`, consolidating the two
  imports into a single runtime_compat use statement

web.rs (+1/-2):
- Replace \`tokio::sync::mpsc\` import with
  \`crate::runtime_compat::mpsc\`, adding it to the existing
  runtime_compat import block alongside sleep and timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
